description_long: A male adult figure is depicted standing with his back against a tall, rectangular concrete pillar. He wears a long, open coat over a shirt and fitted pants, with sturdy boots on his feet. His arms are crossed in front of his chest, and his posture is relaxed, with one leg crossed over the other. The figure has short, styled hair and a confident facial expression. A large wrench is slung over his right shoulder, held in place by his arm and the pillar. The overall appearance suggests a modern, urban pedestrian with a practical, slightly rugged style.
description: A casually dressed male adult stands against a concrete pillar, arms crossed and a large wrench over his shoulder, exuding a relaxed, confident urban vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the man's face, crossed arms, and the wrench resting on his shoulder, with the pillar directly behind him.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the man, the length of his coat, and the way the wrench is positioned between his shoulder and the pillar.
description_view_2: Rear view is dominated by the tall rectangular pillar, with only a small part of the man's head and wrench visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the man's profile, the drape of his coat, and the boots, with the wrench and pillar clearly visible.
attribute_clothing_type: long open coat over a shirt and fitted pants with sturdy boots
attribute_posture: standing with back against a pillar, arms crossed, one leg crossed over the other
